question: Chapters
feedback: The text mentions two main parts – the theoretical and the practical – and further subdivides the theoretical part into three sections. However, it does not list or describe the sub‑sections of the practical part, so the full set of main chapters is not completely presented.

question: Description
feedback: The description covers the contents of the three sub‑sections of the theoretical part, but it omits any description of the practical part’s content. Therefore the brief description of each section is incomplete.

question: Structure
feedback: While the text gives a partial outline (two main parts, three sub‑sections under the theoretical part), it lacks details on the practical part and any overall flow between sections, making the general structure difficult to grasp fully.
